nasb.text: So Saul said to his uncle, “He told us plainly that the donkeys had been found.” But he did not tell him about the matter of the kingdom which Samuel had mentioned.

esv.text: And Saul said to his uncle, “He told us plainly that the donkeys had been found.” But about the matter of the kingdom, of which Samuel had spoken, he did not tell him anything.

cnv.text: 掃羅對他叔叔說：“他清楚地告訴我們，母驢已經找到了。”至於撒母耳所說有關王國的事，掃羅卻沒有告訴他的叔叔。

ccb.text: 扫罗答道：“他肯定地告诉我们驴已经找到了。”但扫罗没有把自己做王的事告诉叔叔。
